name: daydreamer_original_1280x720_q0.scst
upscaling_command: python inference_SCST.py --ckpt_model_path checkpoints/stcm_unet.pth --decoder_tiled_size 224 --encoder_tiled_size 2048 --num_inference_steps 20 --latent_tiled_size 96 --video_path /scratch/src/upscale/png/720/daydreamer_original_1280x720_q0.decoded/ --added_noise_level 350 --init_noise_level 999 --output_dir /scratch/dst/upscaled/SCST/daydreamer_original_1280x720_q0.decoded.scst --upscale 3 --process_size 768 --overlap_frame 1 --unet_config_path models/configs/stcm.yaml --seed 42 --num_frame 8 --prompt A car is parked in a dark parking lot and the camera pans to the front of the car where the headlights are on. --negative_prompt blurry, dotted, noise, raster lines, unclear, lowres, over-smoothed --guidance_scale 5.0 --frame_rate 60 --pretrained_model_path checkpoints/stable-diffusion-2-1-base --controlnet_path checkpoints/controlnet --save_video
